name: TestRegister_WiresFeatureRoutes
description: TestRegister_WiresFeatureRoutes verifies that the composition root correctlyattaches the feature module routes to the shared router. Matching arepresentative route from each module proves that Register successfullydelegated to the feature modules.
descriptionHtml: TestRegister_WiresFeatureRoutes verifies that the composition root correctlyattaches the feature module routes to the shared router. Matching arepresentative route from each module proves that Register successfullydelegated to the feature modules.
